message:
style(pipeline): reformat destructuring patterns in pipeline test assertions

Rustfmt cleanup: collapsed multi-line destructuring of
PipelineResult::Cancelled { cancelled_at, .. } and
PipelineResult::Panicked { panicked_at, .. } to single-line form,
and reformatted the pipeline_with_final cancelled-final test's
function call to standard multi-line argument layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
